summary: OMS Phase 1 Testing Complete - All 23 backend API tests passed (100%), All frontend features verified. Order CRUD, State Machine, Items, Events, Timeline, Financial Summary, and UI working correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/orders - List orders with pagination (200 OK, 27 orders)
✅ POST /api/orders - Create order with hotel items
✅ GET /api/orders/{id} - Get order detail with items and financial_summary
✅ Financial summary aggregates multiple items correctly
✅ Frontend: Orders page loads with stats cards (Total, Draft, Confirmed, Cancelled)
✅ Frontend: Status and Channel filters present and working
✅ Frontend: Orders table with proper columns and data
✅ Frontend: Navigation from list to detail page works
✅ Frontend: Order detail shows items, financial summary, timeline
✅ Frontend: Action buttons (Onayla, İptal Talebi, İptal Et, Kapat) based on status
✅ Frontend: Action confirmation dialog with reason input
✅ Frontend: Status transitions via UI work with toast notifications
✅ Frontend: Create Order dialog with all fields
✅ Frontend: Turkish language UI (Sipariş, Kapatıldı, Onaylandı, etc.)
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created TEST_* prefixed orders for testing. Demo seed created 8 orders with various statuses.
context_for_next_testing_agent: OMS Phase 1 fully implemented and tested. 27 orders exist in the system including 8 demo seeded orders and test orders. State machine enforces transitions: draft→pending_confirmation→confirmed→cancel_requested→cancelled→closed. Three status domains: Order status, Supplier booking status (not_started, pending, confirmed, failed, cancel_requested, cancelled), Settlement status (not_settled, partially_settled, settled, reversed). Timeline shows all events with before/after state. Financial summary aggregates all items. Turkish language UI throughout.

api_verification.POST /api/orders: ✅ 200 - Creates order with items, returns order_id and order_number
api_verification.GET /api/orders: ✅ 200 - Lists orders with filters (status, channel, agency_id)
api_verification.GET /api/orders/{id}: ✅ 200 - Returns order detail with items and financial_summary

ui_verification.Orders List Page: ✅ Header, stats cards (4), filters (2), action buttons (2), orders table
ui_verification.Stats Cards: ✅ Toplam Sipariş, Taslak, Onaylanmış, İptal - with correct counts
ui_verification.Orders Table: ✅ Columns: Sipariş No, Müşteri, Acenta, Kanal, Durum, Satış, Maliyet, Marj, Tarih
ui_verification.Order Detail Page: ✅ Back button, status badges, action buttons, items table, financial summary, timeline
ui_verification.Action Buttons: ✅ Based on order status (draft→confirm, confirmed→request-cancel/cancel/close, etc.)
ui_verification.Create Order Dialog: ✅ All fields present with data-testid attributes
ui_verification.Status Badges: ✅ Taslak, Onay Bekliyor, Onaylandı, İptal Talebi, İptal Edildi, Kapatıldı
